verdicts.corrected_value: A command-line tool and Python package to find usernames across many social networks.
verdicts.reasoning: The description on the GitHub page accurately reflects the recorded value.
The official README and project documentation confirm that there are no public API authentication methods.
The Read the Docs page returned a 404 error, making it impossible to confirm the claim regarding credential access.
The GitHub repository confirms that there are no public API endpoints or developer documentation.
The lack of public API endpoints supports the claim that building an AI-agent integration is blocked.
